requirement_topic.en: EAEU Technical Regulation Framework and Hazardous-Substance Restriction (TR EAEU 037/2016)
requirement_topic.zh: EAEU技术法规框架与有害物质限制（TR EAEU 037/2016）
requirement_topic.zht: EAEU技術法規框架與有害物質限制（TR EAEU 037/2016）

summary.en: Armenia is a member of the Eurasian Economic Union (EAEU). Lithium batteries and power banks placed on the Armenian market are governed by the EAEU / Customs Union technical regulations rather than a standalone national battery law. The applicable acts include TR CU 004/2011 (safety of low-voltage equipment), TR CU 020/2011 (electromagnetic compatibility), and TR EAEU 037/2016 (restriction of the use of hazardous substances in electrical and electronic products — an EAEU RoHS-style restriction limiting lead, mercury, cadmium, hexavalent chromium, and certain brominated flame retardants). Conformity is demonstrated through certification or declaration via an accredited EAEU conformity-assessment body, after which the product bears the single EAC （ЕАС） conformity mark valid across all EAEU member states, including Armenia. SARM （国家标准化机构） maintains adopted GOST / GOST IEC standards used as the technical basis.
summary.zh: 亚美尼亚是欧亚经济联盟（EAEU）成员国。投放亚美尼亚市场的锂电池和移动电源受EAEU/关税同盟技术法规约束，而非单独的国家电池法。适用法规包括TR CU 004/2011（低压设备安全）、TR CU 020/2011（电磁兼容）及TR EAEU 037/2016（电气电子产品有害物质使用限制——EAEU版RoHS式限制，限制铅、汞、镉、六价铬及某些溴化阻燃剂）。合格评定通过EAEU认可的合格评定机构以认证或声明方式完成，之后产品加贴单一EAC（ЕАС）合格标志，在包括亚美尼亚在内的所有EAEU成员国通用。SARM（国家标准化机构）维护作为技术基础的采用版GOST/GOST IEC标准。
summary.zht: 亞美尼亞是歐亞經濟聯盟（EAEU）成員國。投放亞美尼亞市場的鋰電池和行動電源受EAEU/關稅同盟技術法規約束，而非單獨的國家電池法。適用法規包括TR CU 004/2011（低壓設備安全）、TR CU 020/2011（電磁相容）及TR EAEU 037/2016（電氣電子產品有害物質使用限制——EAEU版RoHS式限制，限制鉛、汞、鎘、六價鉻及某些溴化阻燃劑）。合格評定通過EAEU認可的合格評定機構以認證或聲明方式完成，之後產品加貼單一EAC（ЕАС）合格標誌，在包括亞美尼亞在內的所有EAEU成員國通用。SARM（國家標準化機構）維護作為技術基礎的採用版GOST/GOST IEC標準。

standards_or_laws: TR CU 004/2011 — On the safety of low-voltage equipment (EAEU / Customs Union Technical Regulation)
TR CU 020/2011 — Electromagnetic compatibility of technical equipment (EAEU / Customs Union Technical Regulation)
TR EAEU 037/2016 — On restriction of the use of hazardous substances in electrical and electronic products (EAEU hazardous-substance restriction)

summary.en: China does not have a directly equivalent single regulation. Portable lithium battery packs for export are primarily subject to GB 31241-2022 (safety) and, for certain rechargeable battery product categories, mandatory CCC certification under the CNCA / SAMR catalogue. China's domestic hazardous-substance restriction is the China RoHS framework (GB/T 26572 limits and the SJ/T 11364 marking / Administrative Measures for the Restriction of the Use of Hazardous Substances in Electrical and Electronic Products), which is structurally similar in scope to TR EAEU 037/2016 but is a separate Chinese domestic regime not recognised by EAEU bodies. There is no Chinese equivalent of the EAC conformity mark or EAEU certification / declaration procedure.
summary.zh: 中国没有直接对应的单一法规。出口便携式锂电池组主要受GB 31241-2022（安全）约束，部分可充电电池产品类别还须依据CNCA/SAMR目录取得强制性CCC认证。中国国内有害物质限制为中国RoHS框架（GB/T 26572限值及SJ/T 11364标识／《电器电子产品有害物质限制使用管理办法》），其范围与TR EAEU 037/2016在结构上相近，但属独立的中国国内制度，不被EAEU机构认可。中国没有等同于EAC合格标志或EAEU认证/声明程序的对应制度。
summary.zht: 中國沒有直接對應的單一法規。出口便攜式鋰電池組主要受GB 31241-2022（安全）約束，部分可充電電池產品類別還須依據CNCA/SAMR目錄取得強制性CCC認證。中國國內有害物質限制為中國RoHS框架（GB/T 26572限值及SJ/T 11364標識／《電器電子產品有害物質限制使用管理辦法》），其範圍與TR EAEU 037/2016在結構上相近，但屬獨立的中國國內制度，不被EAEU機構認可。中國沒有等同於EAC合格標誌或EAEU認證/聲明程序的對應制度。

standards_or_laws: GB 31241-2022 — Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in portable electronic equipment (SAC/SAMR)
GB/T 26572 — Requirements for concentration limits for certain restricted substances in electrical and electronic products (China RoHS)
Administrative Measures for the Restriction of the Use of Hazardous Substances in Electrical and Electronic Products (MIIT, China RoHS) — domestic framework

gap.en: The EAEU framework imposes obligations with no direct Chinese equivalent for exporters: (1) the single EAC conformity mark obtained through EAEU certification or declaration, not transferable from CCC; (2) the TR EAEU 037/2016 hazardous-substance restriction, which although similar in concept to China RoHS must be demonstrated under EAEU rules and documentation; (3) reliance on adopted GOST / GOST IEC standards as the technical basis rather than GB standards. Chinese exporters must engage an accredited EAEU conformity-assessment body and an in-country importer to obtain market access, regardless of existing GB 31241 or China RoHS compliance.
gap.zh: EAEU框架对出口商施加了中国无直接对应的义务：（1）通过EAEU认证或声明取得的单一EAC合格标志，不可由CCC转移；（2）TR EAEU 037/2016有害物质限制，虽与中国RoHS概念相近，但须依EAEU规则和文件证明；（3）以采用版GOST/GOST IEC标准而非GB标准作为技术基础。无论现有GB 31241或中国RoHS合规情况如何，中国出口商均须委托EAEU认可的合格评定机构并通过在地进口商取得市场准入。
gap.zht: EAEU框架對出口商施加了中國無直接對應的義務：（1）通過EAEU認證或聲明取得的單一EAC合格標誌，不可由CCC轉移；（2）TR EAEU 037/2016有害物質限制，雖與中國RoHS概念相近，但須依EAEU規則和文件證明；（3）以採用版GOST/GOST IEC標準而非GB標準作為技術基礎。無論現有GB 31241或中國RoHS合規情況如何，中國出口商均須委託EAEU認可的合格評定機構並通過在地進口商取得市場准入。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — TR CU 004/2011, TR CU 020/2011, and TR EAEU 037/2016 are directly applicable across all EAEU member states including Armenia; the EAC conformity mark is required before market placement
mandatory_status.cn: Not applicable in equivalent form — GB 31241 safety compliance, China RoHS, and (where catalogued) CCC are domestic requirements; the EAC mark and EAEU certification / declaration procedure do not apply to Chinese exporters under Chinese law

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Market access to Armenia runs through the EAEU technical-regulation framework — TR CU 004/2011, TR CU 020/2011, and TR EAEU 037/2016 — evidenced by the single EAC conformity mark issued via an accredited EAEU body. Chinese GB 31241, China RoHS, and CCC do not by themselves satisfy these obligations. Exporters should prepare EAEU-facing conformity assessment on a GOST IEC basis and document hazardous-substance restriction compliance.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 进入亚美尼亚市场须经EAEU技术法规框架——TR CU 004/2011、TR CU 020/2011及TR EAEU 037/2016——并以经EAEU认可机构签发的单一EAC合格标志为凭证。中国GB 31241、中国RoHS及CCC本身不能满足上述义务。出口商应在GOST IEC基础上准备面向EAEU的合格评定，并就有害物质限制合规留存文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 進入亞美尼亞市場須經EAEU技術法規框架——TR CU 004/2011、TR CU 020/2011及TR EAEU 037/2016——並以經EAEU認可機構簽發的單一EAC合格標誌為憑證。中國GB 31241、中國RoHS及CCC本身不能滿足上述義務。出口商應在GOST IEC基礎上準備面向EAEU的合格評定，並就有害物質限制合規留存文件。

source.publisher: Eurasian Economic Commission (EEC) — Technical Regulations of the EAEU
